title: BrawlWiz's: FactionCraft
description: Fight against other factions in this 512x512 block wide world! Gather Mythic Weapons while using armor sets that provide with extra abilities to fight against your opponents.
body:
![Overview of the World!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e9a0ddf9c519b81d82cf37c39c1ca3026e1cf5a.jpeg)


This data pack introduces faction-inspired RPG elements to your Minecraft world. Immerse yourself in thrilling gameplay with:

## Features:
- **Special Abilities**: Unlock a total of 50 unique abilities by equipping a full armor set of the same material (e.g., full Diamond) and right-clicking a sword or axe. Five additional abilities are exclusive to mythic items.
  
- **World Events**: Experience dynamic events like rotating structures, boss fights, dungeons, capture-the-flag challenges, supply drops, and wandering merchants.
  
- **Diverse Zones**: Explore a world divided into distinct regions: cold, swampy, and temperate biomes.
  
- **Quarry Mining**: Gather valuable minerals at the Quarry, located at the map's center.

- **Marketplaces**: Trade with unique villagers on the western and eastern parts of the world and see what they have to offer.
  
- **Unique Structures**: Discover hidden structures in every corner of the world.
  
- **Clan Bases**: Encounter "player" NPCs at Clan Bases, ready to defend their territory or attack intruders.
  
- **Periodic Raids**: Beware of unexpected raids! Build a base quickly to survive.


## **Important Notes**:
- **Render and Simulation Distance**: Must be set to 32 chunks at all times to ensure proper functionality.
  
- **Shields Disabled**: Shields are not available in this data pack.
  
- **New World Required**: Install the data pack on a fresh world to avoid breaking existing saves.

### To start playing, simply type the following command: /function faction:_game_cmds/_start

- Dev: Have fun :D
